name: TLC5947 LED driver
description: The tlc5947 output component exposes a tlc5947 channel of a global [Component/Hub](https://esphome.io/components/output/tlc5947#tlc5947-component) as a float output.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this output component.

config_entries.label: Channel
config_entries.description: Chose the channel of the TLC5947 chain of this output component.

config_entries.label: Tlc5947 ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [TLC5947-component](https://esphome.io/components/output/tlc5947#tlc5947-component). Use this if you have multiple TLC5947 chains you want to use at the same time.
